target_type_disclosure.summary: Deep link targets a managed-cloud workspace. Origin and handler ownership verified.

policy_restrictions_disclosure.summary: Authority widens because the deep link requests managed-cloud reattach. Review required before commit.

result_mode_disclosure.summary: Resolves to live-session resume after intent review admits the link.

trust_posture_disclosure.summary: Trust is revalidated at resume; expired authority blocks the resume until reauth completes.

fallback_disclosure.summary: Cancel returns to the previous workspace. inspect_only opens a read-only placeholder while authority remains pending.

presentation_subtitle: Origin verified. Authority widening requires review before commit.
